name: Whitestone Jewelers
description_short: Miami jewelry store and pawn shop offering diamond and gold buying, jewelry sales and repair, watch repair, and wholesale jewelry services.
description_long:
Whitestone Jewelers is a full-service jewelry and pawn operation located in Miami, FL. The business operates across multiple verticals simultaneously — functioning as a retail jewelry store, a buyer of diamonds, gold, and estate pieces, a jewelry and watch repair shop, and a wholesale jeweler. The combination of buying, selling, and repair under one roof is characteristic of established pawn-adjacent jewelry businesses in the Miami market. No verified founding date or ownership history was found in public records for this specific Miami location.

The business offers a notably broad range of services that span both the retail and collateral-lending sides of the jewelry trade. As a pawn shop and diamond/gold buyer, they purchase unwanted or estate jewelry, loose diamonds, gold, and other precious items from consumers — providing immediate cash. As a jewelry store and wholesale jeweler, they also sell pieces at retail and potentially trade pricing. Their repair services cover standard jewelry work as well as watch repair, making them a convenient one-stop shop for consumers with wearable asset needs.

What distinguishes Whitestone Jewelers in a competitive Miami market is their Google rating of 5.0 out of 5 stars based on 86 verified reviews — an unusually high score for a pawn-adjacent business, where customer experience can be inconsistent. Their listed business subtypes span seven categories (pawn shop, diamond buyer, gold dealer, jewelry repair, jewelry store, jewelry buyer, watch repair, wholesale jeweler), indicating genuine operational breadth rather than a single-focus shop. This suggests a business with experienced staff capable of assessing and working across multiple jewelry and watch categories.

The main practical limitation is the absence of a public website, which means consumers cannot research pricing, inventory, or policies before visiting. All transactions appear to require in-person quotes, which is standard for pawn and estate jewelry buying but can be inconvenient. No BBB profile was verified for this specific Miami location, so third-party complaint history is not available. Consumers selling valuables should get multiple quotes before transacting, as is best practice with any gold or diamond buyer.
pros: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating from 86 reviews — unusually high for a pawn and jewelry buying business
Covers seven distinct service categories: pawn, diamond buying, gold dealing, jewelry repair, retail sales, jewelry buying, and watch repair
Wholesale jewelry capability suggests access to trade-level pricing for buyers
On-site watch repair available — uncommon in pawn-adjacent shops
Miami location provides convenient access for South Florida consumers with jewelry, gold, or diamond assets to sell or repair
cons: No website found — consumers cannot verify pricing, policies, or inventory before visiting
No verified BBB profile for this Miami location — third-party complaint history unavailable
All pricing appears to be quote-based in person, making comparison shopping difficult
No published pawn loan terms (rates, loan-to-value ratios) found in any public source
best_for: Miami-area consumers looking to sell gold, diamonds, or estate jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers seeking jewelry or watches at potentially wholesale or trade pricing
Consumers needing jewelry repair or watch repair without sending items out
Anyone needing a short-term pawn loan collateralized by jewelry or precious metals
diagnosis: Whitestone Jewelers is best suited for Miami consumers who need to buy, sell, or repair jewelry and want a single local shop with demonstrated customer satisfaction. The 5.0 Google rating across 86 reviews is the strongest verifiable signal of quality here. The main caveat is the lack of a public website or published pricing — all transactions require an in-person visit, and consumers selling valuables should compare offers before committing.
services: Jewelry repair (ring sizing, chain repair, prong work, etc.)
